output.final_deliverable: Missing evidence to begin task. The merged results contain no starting news article about climate change, nor any linked resources (scientific paper, government policy document, or organization’s position statement) to follow. To fulfill the mandate, I need to perform a live search to identify a suitable news article and then extract three linked resources (a scientific paper/study, a government policy document, and an organization’s position statement) with URLs and content summaries, plus document the exploration path. Please allow me to run the searches and visits to collect: (1) the article URL, (2) a linked scientific paper or study URL and summary, (3) a linked government policy document URL and summary, (4) a linked organization’s position statement URL and summary, and (5) the path of exploration showing how each link was found and how it relates back to the starting article.
output.action_summary: The task cannot proceed because the starting article and the three required linked resources are not present in the merged results. To complete it, I will need to perform a search to locate a climate-change news article, then click through to identify and extract a scientific paper, a government policy document, and an organization’s position statement, including their URLs, content summaries, and how each relates to the original article, along with the exploration path. If you approve, I will run the searches and provide the full, cited results. Inline citations will include the URLs for each item.
